floatingRail: Right rail shell inset by 10px from the viewport to match the floating sidebar family.
Shell now uses full border, controlled radius, and light shadow separation rather than edge-glued presentation.
Sticky head, scrollable body, and sticky footer are unified inside the same floating shell.
composerDock: Closed footer CTA spacing was tightened so the dock stays slim when idle.
Open-state native composer host uses calmer containment around #top-ce and #comment-editor without clipping native controls.
Footer border, backdrop, and radius language now aligns with the rest of the rail family.
actionHierarchy: Reply remains the primary bottom action and More stays as a quieter top-right utility.
Timestamp and contextual meta were softened to keep body copy visually primary.
Nested thread rail and state treatments were reduced to avoid a forum-widget feel.

acceptedNativeBloggerLimitations: The rail remains a visual/runtime enhancement over Blogger-native comments markup.
Open-comment compose fixtures remain unset, so compose-lane proof is explicit skip.
Native Blogger iframe internals remain treated as cross-origin UI; only the host shell and dock are minimized.
